title: TBench output directory hygiene
prompt: FAKE_TBENCH_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_HYGIENE: write only the required submission file.

commandChecks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
entries = sorted(path.name for path in Path('submission').iterdir())
assert entries == ['main.rs'], entries
PY

constraints: temporary validation binaries must not be left in required output directories
final submission directories should contain exactly the files the verifier expects
